TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Kawaliwali = Gaga mniq Taytung Cusangsyang ka alang Kawaliwali. 147 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 371 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 74% niqan 276 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 26% niqan 95 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis71%, Puyuma1%, Kebalan1%, ni rahuq na o1%.
S.PHON: = kawaliwali = gaga mniq tajtuŋ ʦusaŋsjaŋ ka alaŋ kawaliwali. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, amis**%, pujuma*%, kəbalan*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
S.FORM: = Kawaliwali = Gaga mniq Taytung Cusangsyang ka alang Kawaliwali. 147 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 371 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 74% niqan 276 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 26% niqan 95 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis71%, Puyuma1%, Kebalan1%, ni rahuq na o1%.
S.PHON: = kawaliwali = gaga mniq tajtuŋ ʦusaŋsjaŋ ka alaŋ kawaliwali. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, amis**%, pujuma*%, kəbalan*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
